philosophy_root: Think and Grow Rich (Specialized Knowledge) / Atomic Habits (Identity Based Change)

human_dimension.daily_1_percent_action: Complete one MMI scenario and verbally debate the Swarm for 5 minutes.

ai_dimension.daily_1_percent_action: Scrape and ingest one new Canadian Medical Association Journal (CMAJ) article daily into the Hippocampus RAG.

human_dimension.daily_1_percent_action: Directly code or architect one new Daemon concept for 20 minutes.

ai_dimension.daily_1_percent_action: Run automated static analysis on one core logic file daily and resolve a dormant bug.
